steps.note: Raw data - each object is one belief (id, kind, claim, deps). The whole graph is this one file.

choices.label: How does raw JSON become a struct?
How is it rendered back out?

steps.note: The boundary: a JSON map with string keys becomes a typed %Belief{}. Everything downstream works on the struct, not the map.
Loads the whole graph off disk and hands back %Belief{} structs. The single read path the CLI and dashboard share.
Renders beliefs back out to the terminal (ANSI). The other end of the pipeline from the raw JSON you started at.
